message:
feat(session): implement O(index+tail) V2 resume path (bd-3ar8v.3.3)

Add V2 sidecar detection in Session::open_with_diagnostics so that sessions
with a .v2 sidecar store use seek-based O(index+tail) loading instead of
full O(n) JSONL parsing. Includes create_v2_sidecar_from_jsonl migration
function and 9 integration tests covering round-trip, parent chains,
integrity validation, and resume parity with JSONL.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
